abilities.name: Darkness Of The Soul
abilities.flavor: Cathallars wield the negative energy locked in aetherquartz as a weapon.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, subtract D6 from the control score of the target unit this turn.

abilities.name: Moonfire Flask
abilities.flavor: The High Warden carries a flask filled with a burning silvery liquid that can be hurled at the incoming enemy.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Lofted Shots
abilities.flavor: To strike a distant target, these warriors point their bows to the sky before launching a volley up high.
abilities.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Auralan Bows but subtract 1 from hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks .

abilities.name: Moonfire Flask
abilities.flavor: The High Warden carries a flask filled with a burning silvery liquid that can be hurled at the incoming enemy.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Lofted Shots
abilities.flavor: To strike a distant target, these warriors point their bows to the sky before launching a volley up high.
abilities.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Auralan Bows but subtract 1 from hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks .

abilities.name: Swordmasters
abilities.flavor: Vanari Bladelords adopt different fighting styles depending upon the nature of their opponents.
abilities.effect: Each time this unit uses a FIGHT ability , you must pick either the Perfect Strike or Flurry of Blows weapon characteristics for all the attacks it makes with its Sunmetal Greatblade. In addition: Do not use the attack sequence for an attack made with Perfect Strike . Instead, roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit.

abilities.name: Guardians
abilities.flavor: Bladelords are tasked with protecting the Scinari from harm.
abilities.effect: While your general is wholly within this unit’s combat range , both this unit and your general have WARD ( 5+ ) .

battleTraits.name: Facets Of War
battleTraits.summary: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round
battleTraits.effect: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round. Pick 1 FACET OF WAR ability. That FACET OF WAR ability can be used this battle round but the other two cannot.

battleTraits.name: Shining Company
battleTraits.summary: Subtract 1 from hit rolls that target friendly units
battleTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls that target friendly units. KEYWORDS FACET OF WAR

battleTraits.name: Power Of Hysh
battleTraits.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, until the start of your next turn, attacks made by that unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+. KEYWORDS FACET OF WAR
